name: hf-explorer
description: Browse, search, and read Hugging Face Hub repos — models, datasets, and spaces. Optional hf-mount integration for filesystem-level access.
author: IVE

components.name: HF Explorer
components.description: Teaches the agent when and how to explore Hugging Face Hub — progressive discovery from search to file reading

mcp_server.name: hf-explorer
mcp_server.description: Search, browse, and read Hugging Face Hub repos — models, datasets, spaces. Optional hf-mount for filesystem access.
